case_title: PORTLAND SUSHI & SEAFOOD BUFFET, INC., AN OREGON VS. CHOO C CHANG

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTLAND SUSHI & SEAFOOD BUFFET, INC., AN OREGON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHOO C , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
